Turn construction drawings into accurate material estimates in minutes, not weeks.
01
slide 2 of 9
The Problem

Pre-construction estimation is broken

50-80%1
of estimation time is spent on manual quantification: measuring, counting, and re-measuring drawings by hand.
52%2
of costly project changes originate from errors made during early estimation, compounding through the project lifecycle.

Every bid your team loses still cost you weeks of labor to prepare.

1 Construction Deconstructed (Plangrid, 2018)    2 Goucher & Thurairajah (2012)

With Cantena

Quantity takeoff in hours
Reclaim your preconstruction capacity. Cantena handles the quantification so your estimators can focus on what actually requires their expertise.

03
slide 4 of 9
How It Works

Three steps. No learning curve.

1

Upload your drawing set

DD or CD plans. Just drag and drop the PDFs your team already has.

2

AI extracts measurements

Our vision pipeline reads architectural and structural drawings, identifying materials, dimensions, and quantities automatically.

3

Review a CSI-formatted breakdown

Get a division-level quantity report in minutes. Every number is traceable back to the source drawing. Your estimators verify, not recreate.

Cantena augments the estimator, it doesn't replace them. Your team stays in control.
Before
After

96%

Scope Measurements Accuracy

Next Steps

A 90-day pilot with zero disruption to your team

Weeks 1–2

Onboarding

We configure Cantena for your drawing formats and CSI divisions. Your team uploads a live project, no training needed.

Weeks 3–8

Side-by-side testing

Run Cantena in parallel with your existing workflow. Compare results, measure time saved, and validate accuracy on your actual projects.

Weeks 9–12

Review & decision

We present results together: accuracy data, time savings, and estimator feedback. You decide whether to move forward.

Pilot terms

✓ 90-day paid pilot: a commitment that proves value before a larger contract
✓ Pilot fee credited toward your annual subscription if you continue
✓ Dedicated support: our founding team works directly with your estimators
✓ No workflow change required: Cantena runs alongside your current tools
